text.title: AI-Assisted Accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA) Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying ai-assisted-accessibility. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team publishes 'WCAG 2.2 AA conformant' on automated scan alone.
Procurement asks for the report; team sends a Lighthouse link.
Audit asks for evidence per issue; team cannot reproduce scan logs.
antipattern.fix: Cite scan log id OR tester id + transcript per finding.

antipattern.symptom: Report 3 years stale; new criteria added in WCAG 2.3.
